title: Microsoft-Backed Space and Time Launches AI App Builder on Base
message_html: Microsoft-Backed Space and Time Launches AI App Builder on Base ...
snippet: The no-code platform aims to make building and deploying on-chain apps as simple as writing a prompt.

title: MoonPay launches fiat-to-stablecoin virtual accounts in New York
message_html: MoonPay launches fiat-to-stablecoin virtual accounts in New York ...
snippet: MoonPay has expanded its virtual accounts product to New York, allowing businesses to convert fiat into stablecoins and settle funds without prefunding across jurisdictions.
